/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/attack_test.dir/attack_test.cpp.o -o ../../bin/attack_test  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib ../../lib/libProject2.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-graphics.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-audio.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-window.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-system.3.0.2.dylib
